meaning: n.埃米尔(穆斯林国家的酋长.贵族或王公)
examples: Qatar’s Sheikha Al Mayassa, the daughter of the Emir, runs the Qatar Museums Authority.
Reverse racism plays a crucial role in the success of Emir Kusturica's films in the West.
The new Al Jazeera channel, like the original, is heavily subsidized by the emir of Qatar.
The Emir provided me insights into how he sees reform evolving throughout the region.
